projects.name: Bondly — Keep Your Network Alive
projects.label: Practice Project
projects.description: Developed a modern relationship management web application that helps users build, organize, and maintain meaningful personal and professional connections through a clean and intuitive interface.
projects.details: This project demonstrates scalable frontend architecture using Next.js and React, efficient state management with Context API, and interactive data visualization using Recharts. The application focuses on performance, usability, and a smooth user experience.
keyContributions: Designed and developed a responsive UI with Tailwind CSS and daisyUI for a clean and modern experience
Implemented Context API for managing global state such as friends and timeline interactions
Built dynamic routing using Next.js App Router for user profiles, stats, and timeline pages
Integrated data visualization using Recharts to represent user interaction insights
Added toast notifications for real-time user feedback using React Toastify
Structured the project for scalability and maintainability following modern best practices
challenges: Managing timeline, quality, and compatibility constraints.
futurePlans: Add richer automation and continue iterative UI/UX refinement.

projects.name: Simple BookStore – Premium Literature Exploration UI
projects.label: Practice Project
projects.description: Developed a professional, minimal web application for book enthusiasts to discover, track, and manage their personal reading collections with a focus on high-end typography and clean UI.
projects.details: This project showcases advanced React Router implementations, persistent data management via LocalStorage, and a refined design system built on Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI.
keyContributions: Architected dynamic routing for seamless navigation between catalog, details, and list views
Implemented persistent data logic for 'Read List' and 'Wishlist' across browser sessions
Developed an editorial-style Book Details page with a focus on content hierarchy and top-aligned imagery
Designed a professional, cart-style list interface for efficient collection management
Integrated Lucide icons and Google Fonts (Outfit) for a cohesive, modern aesthetic
challenges: Managing timeline, quality, and compatibility constraints.
futurePlans: Add richer automation and continue iterative UI/UX refinement.

projects.name: DigiTools Platform – React E-commerce UI with Dynamic Cart
projects.label: Practice Project
projects.description: Built a modern web application for exploring and purchasing digital workflow tools, focusing on clean UI design and interactive user experience.
projects.details: This project highlights my understanding of state management, component-based architecture, and building real-world interactive interfaces using modern frontend tools.
keyContributions: Developed a dynamic shopping cart with real-time add/remove functionality
Built interactive product and pricing cards with responsive layouts
Implemented toast notifications for better user feedback
Designed a modern, mobile-friendly UI using utility-first styling
challenges: Managing timeline, quality, and compatibility constraints.
futurePlans: Add richer automation and continue iterative UI/UX refinement.

projects.name: Get Advice – React App using Suspense & use() Hook
projects.label: Practice Project
projects.description: Built a React application that demonstrates modern asynchronous data handling using React Suspense and the experimental use() hook.
projects.details: This project highlights my understanding of modern React patterns, async rendering, and API integration. It uses the experimental use() hook for cleaner promise-based data flow and Suspense for smooth loading states.
keyContributions: Integrated external API to fetch dynamic content
Implemented Suspense for smooth loading states
Used promise-based data flow with use() for cleaner logic
Designed a simple and responsive UI
challenges: Managing timeline, quality, and compatibility constraints.
futurePlans: Add richer automation and continue iterative UI/UX refinement.

projects.name: CoinTax - The Leading UK Cryptocurrency Accounting Firm
projects.label: Client Project
projects.description: Developed and implemented the WordPress version of the CoinTax website, a UK-based cryptocurrency accounting firm specializing in tax services for crypto investors and businesses.
projects.details: Responsibilities included converting the original design into a fully functional WordPress website, implementing responsive layouts, integrating dynamic components, and deploying the site to a live production environment.
keyContributions: Converted the website design into a fully responsive WordPress theme
Implemented front-end and back-end functionality
Integrated custom layouts and dynamic content sections
Optimized the website for performance and usability
Deployed and configured the website on the live server
Ensured cross-browser compatibility and responsive design
challenges: Managing timeline, quality, and compatibility constraints.
futurePlans: Add richer automation and continue iterative UI/UX refinement.

projects.name: Cartecadeau PF - Website Recovery, Malware Cleanup & Secure Migration
projects.label: Client Project
projects.description: Performed full recovery, malware cleanup, and secure migration of a compromised WordPress website, restoring it to a stable production-ready state.
projects.details: The project involved identifying and removing malware from an infected WordPress installation, verifying file integrity, and migrating the website to a clean Cloudways VPS environment. Additional work included server configuration, SSL setup, and resolving DNS propagation issues to ensure consistent global accessibility.
keyContributions: Performed complete malware cleanup and file integrity verification
Migrated the website to a fresh Cloudways VPS environment
Configured server and applied basic security hardening
Installed SSL certificate and enforced HTTPS across the site
Verified wp-admin access and ensured full site functionality
Resolved DNS propagation inconsistencies during testing
Ensured stable performance and global accessibility post-deployment
challenges: Managing timeline, quality, and compatibility constraints.
futurePlans: Add richer automation and continue iterative UI/UX refinement.

projects.name: Davita Clinics - Healthcare Services Website
projects.label: Client Project
projects.description: Designed, developed, and deployed a healthcare services website for Davita Clinics, providing information about clinic locations, patient care, and medical services.
projects.details: The project involved building a fully responsive WordPress website that allowed users to explore clinic availability across different locations in Saudi Arabia, view healthcare statistics such as patient care capacity, and access information about doctors and elderly care services. The website is now offline due to internal client decisions.
keyContributions: Designed the website layout and user interface
Developed the website using WordPress CMS
Structured pages for clinic locations, services, and healthcare information
Integrated dynamic content for patient statistics and medical staff details
Implemented responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Optimized performance and usability
Deployed and configured the website on a live production server
challenges: Managing timeline, quality, and compatibility constraints.
futurePlans: Add richer automation and continue iterative UI/UX refinement.
projects.archivedNote: The client discontinued the website due to internal operational changes.
